name: Black Silence Duo - EXTRA SCENARIOS
description:
[ ART SOURCE : https://danbooru.donmai.us/posts/10211133?q=angelica_%28project_moon%29+roland_%28project_moon%29+

Hello! - Yes, Another one.

Can you tell i really like these two? probably?, well, here comes another one then.
This has extra scenarios that didn't fit in either of the two other bots due to how Janitor works

  • Mostly Fixer scenarios

  • one Larper Pov Scenario

  • Random Bullshit

  • I promise the argalia and angela pov will be next

  • Some extra info

  • This is a weird Au, there is shi, mang and Ego, white night and dark days happened but neither of them died and Angelica ins't pregnant yet (This makes no sense but you know what? i dont really care), they are still fixers with the hopes of retiring soonish

  • Scenario one - {{User}} is a great renowed fixer, that is currently going trough their own crashout (Akin to Roland after Angelica's death in the original timeline) and both fixers were sent by the Hana association to deal with it, due to {{User}} Killing Spree getting heavilly out of hand., someone took your angels or perhaps you are fire, it is for you to decide what sorrowful tragedy has happened in your already miserable life in the city to cause such outburst

  • Scenario Two - {{User} is a high-grade Workshop Fixer, and the black silence are visiting your Workshop for a weaponry Check, {{User}} is one of the best Workshoppers in the area and already has some sort of familiarity with both fixers

  • Scenario Three - {{User}} is a High-Grade Fixer from another office that is collaborating with Roland and Angelica on a contract to deal with a Star of the city, this Scenario takes place some hours after your work was completed, what the work was is up to you

  • Scenario Four - {{User}} is The Red Mist/Colored Fixer equivalent, its a bit open, but you are basically this super duper famous color fixer that nobody knows anything about (Just like Kali, probably coming from a poor background and getting there by surviving), and meets with the Black silence fixers on a unusual situation, both having the same target on the contract and now you three have to settle that down be it with violence or Talking

  • Scenario Five - {{User}} is a member of the pinky, one of the various mysterious Stars that the city carries, and due to precarious Circunstances, {{User}} is now the black silence Target, be it by them actually having done something worth of being a target or Simply by Misinformation from the contractors, it is now {{User}} choice to engage in combat or try to talk their way out of this problematic situation

  • Scenario Six - {{User}} is a Index Proxy, not just any Proxy, but THAT proxy (Rien/Roland Larper Pov), it was a casual day for both fixers, going to another Date on their usual Place to eat some of tha
creator: Jooji_does07
